title: eruca vesicaria var. longirostris
intro: Eruca vesicaria var. longirostris, also known as Long-beaked Rocket or Wild Rocket, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its edible leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Eruca vesicaria var. longirostris include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as to support digestive health and reduce inflammation. Eruca vesicaria var. longirostris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used fresh in salads, adding a peppery flavor and nutritional value.
